title: [InstCombine] Fixing wrong select folding in vectors with undef elements

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary focuses on undef elements and ConstantExpr skipping, but this test uses icmp-generated constant condition vector without undef, testing the generalization to any provably constant condition pattern

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define <4 x i32> @constant_expr_icmp_condition_vector(<4 x i32> %a, <4 x i32> %b) {
#0:
  %cond = icmp eq <4 x i32> { 1, 1, 2, 1 }, { 1, 2, 2, 3 }
  %result = select <4 x i1> %cond, <4 x i32> %a, <4 x i32> %b
  ret <4 x i32> %result
}
=>
define <4 x i32> @constant_expr_icmp_condition_vector(<4 x i32> %a, <4 x i32> %b) {
#0:
  %result = shufflevector <4 x i32> %a, <4 x i32> %b, 0, 5, 2, 7
  ret <4 x i32> %result
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary discusses mixed true/false/undef patterns; this all-true case tests the complete RHS elimination path enabled by isOneValue() checking on all elements

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define <4 x float> @all_true_condition_vector(<4 x float> %lhs, <4 x float> %rhs) {
#0:
  %result = select <4 x i1> { 1, 1, 1, 1 }, <4 x float> %lhs, <4 x float> %rhs
  ret <4 x float> %result
}
=>
define <4 x float> @all_true_condition_vector(<4 x float> %lhs, <4 x float> %rhs) {
#0:
  ret <4 x float> %lhs
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary emphasizes isOneValue() for true conditions but doesn't highlight isNullValue() with arithmetic ConstantExpr. This test uses add/sub ConstantExpr evaluating to false (0), exercising the isNullValue path with ConstantExpr that was previously skipped.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define <2 x i32> @test_constexpr_arith_false(<2 x i32> %a, <2 x i32> %b) {
#0:
  %c = select <2 x i1> { 0, 0 }, <2 x i32> %a, <2 x i32> %b
  ret <2 x i32> %c
}
=>
define <2 x i32> @test_constexpr_arith_false(<2 x i32> %a, <2 x i32> %b) {
#0:
  ret <2 x i32> %b
}
Transformation seems to be correct!
